metadata.title: Çandarlı Uzman Real Estate | We Add Value to Your Investments
metadata.description: Houses, villas, land and investment properties for sale and rent in Çandarlı, Dikili and the wider İzmir region. 30+ years of local expertise.
metadata.keywords: Çandarlı real estate, Dikili property, Çandarlı for sale, Aegean coast property, İzmir summer house, Greece investment, Turkey property

hero.subtitle: With 30+ years of local expertise on the Çandarlı coast, Dikili and surrounding villages, we help you find the right property and stand by you long after the deal is closed.

about.title: The Region's Expert, By Your Side
about.p1: At Çandarlı Uzman Real Estate, we have been serving the Çandarlı coast, Dikili and surrounding villages with 30+ years of local expertise. Being local means knowing every street, every parcel, and the future potential of every neighbourhood.
about.p2: Beyond simply matching buyers and sellers, we deliver opportunities that genuinely add value to our clients' investments. From foreign investors to families looking for a retirement summer house, from office hunters to land sellers — we aim to be the single trusted address for every need.
about.value_trust_desc: Transparency and honesty all the way to the title deed.
about.value_local_desc: We know the region street by street.
about.value_service_desc: End-to-end from purchase to title to rental.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We're always here for your questions, listings and investment plans.
contact.form_success: Your message was sent, we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong, please contact us by phone.

footer.tagline: Your expert solution partner in real estate sales, rentals and valuation in Çandarlı, Dikili and the İzmir region.
